name: Aquilo
description: Aquilo is a stoic loner, but his heart is at the right place. He has strong deductive skills, and is observant before taking any decisive action. As an Avis, he knows that his kind can be easily exploited for nefarious purposes, as they can easily fly to places other beastfolk cannot. He fights to protect other Avis and serve justice to those for persecute his people.
creator: Professor Olsen
